title: epidendrum molleturense
intro: Epidendrum molleturense, also known as the Molleturense Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Epidendrum molleturense is typically used as a tincture or infusion, often combined with other medicinal plants, to create remedies for various health conditions.
